searchLedger.hypothesis: Publication-gate provenance fallback does not change search membership or ranking

searchActions.result: applyPublicationGateToResponse maps existing data.results after formatting at memory-search.ts:581-608 and is invoked after formatting/cache preparation at memory-search.ts:1345 and memory-search.ts:1357. It returns non-contract results unchanged at memory-search.ts:581-584.

searchLedger.rationale: The read-path change annotates existing result objects with publishable/exclusion fields and normalized provenance; it does not alter query, score, sort, limit, or result membership.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: No ranking or membership mutation found in the changed search code.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Constitutional guard test still proves automated cannot overwrite manual

searchActions.result: The updated assertion still expects title to remain 'Wave 1 fixture', importance_weight safe-field update to persist, source_kind to remain 'human', provenance_source/provenance_actor to persist, and response to contain 'skipped to protect manual data' plus 'title' at lines 251-259.

searchLedger.rationale: The test was strengthened with provenance assertions rather than weakened; targeted Vitest run passed 4 files / 41 tests.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: No masked regression or deleted guard assertion found in the four modified tests.

title: PE update path ignores caller write provenance and can stamp automated saves as human
evidence: memory-save builds caller-aware writeProvenance at memory-save.ts:2269-2274, but evaluateAndApplyPeDecision is called without it at memory-save.ts:2404-2406. The PE UPDATE append path hard-codes applyWriteProvenance({ provenanceSource: 'prediction-error-gate', provenanceActor: 'memory-save', tool: 'memory_save' }) at pe-gating.ts:333-339. deriveSourceKindFromContext defaults to 'human' when those labels do not classify and there is no agent-only scope at write-provenance.ts:70-93.
rationale: Automated callers that supplied provenance to memory_save lose that provenance on PE UPDATE and may get source_kind='human', weakening the provenance invariant for the append-version path. The four modified tests do not cover this PE update path.

title: ENV_REFERENCE row is unrelated to provenance injection scope
evidence: The added row documents SPECKIT_ADVISOR_DOC_TRIGGERS, an advisor doc-frontmatter harvest flag. Its code is honored and default-off at system-skill-advisor/mcp_server/lib/skill-graph/doc-frontmatter.ts:21-23 and allowlisted at .opencode/bin/mk-skill-advisor-launcher.cjs:85-102.
rationale: The row appears correct and default-safe, but it belongs to skill-advisor doc-trigger harvest rather than the provenance injection concern under review.

title: Named 022 provenance doc folder was not found
evidence: Glob/grep found no specs/**/022-provenance-injection. The closest provenance packet found has packet_pointer system-spec-kit/027-xce-research-based-refinement/007-memclaw-derived-memory-hardening/001-provenance-and-audit at spec.md:14; strict validation on that folder passed.
rationale: If this commit is supposed to be documented under 027/022-provenance-injection, the named packet docs are missing or misidentified, so the requested doc review cannot verify that folder.
